title: Hinch Yourself Happy
author: Mrs Hinch
subline: The cleaning sensation's guide to a sparkling home.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A grid of 9x6 = 54 squares. Some are 'clean' (white), some 'dirty' (graphite), some 'sparkling' (red with rays). The pattern is a before/after. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1100)">
    <!-- 9 columns x 6 rows of 60x60 squares with 8px gaps. Total 9*60+8*8 = 540+64 = 604. Centered: x from -302 to 302, y from -182 to 182. -->
    <g fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.45">
      <!-- Row 1 -->
      <rect x="-302" y="-182" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="-234" y="-182" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="-166" y="-182" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="-98" y="-182" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="-30" y="-182" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="38" y="-182" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="106" y="-182" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="174" y="-182" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="242" y="-182" width="60" height="60"/>
      <!-- Row 2 -->
      <rect x="-302" y="-114" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="-234" y="-114" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="-166" y="-114" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="-98" y="-114" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="-30" y="-114" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="38" y="-114" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="106" y="-114" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="174" y="-114" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="242" y="-114" width="60" height="60"/>
      <!-- Row 3 -->
      <rect x="-302" y="-46" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="-234" y="-46" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="-166" y="-46" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="-98" y="-46" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="38" y="-46" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="106" y="-46" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="174" y="-46" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="242" y="-46" width="60" height="60"/>
      <!-- Row 4 -->
      <rect x="-302" y="22" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="-234" y="22" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="-166" y="22" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="-98" y="22" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="38" y="22" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="106" y="22" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="174" y="22" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="242" y="22" width="60" height="60"/>
      <!-- Row 5 -->
      <rect x="-302" y="90" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="-234" y="90" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="-166" y="90" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="-98" y="90" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="38" y="90" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="106" y="90" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="174" y="90" width="60" height="60"/><rect x="242" y="90" width="60" height="60"/>
    </g>
    <!-- CLEAN squares (white) - the after -->
    <g fill="#ffffff">
      <rect x="-30" y="-46" width="60" height="60"/>
      <rect x="-302" y="-46" width="60" height="60"/>
      <rect x="38" y="22" width="60" height="60"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The single RED sparkling square with rays -->
    <g transform="translate(174 -46)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="60" height="60" fill="#fc1c46"/>
      <g stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2">
        <line x1="30" y1="-10" x2="30" y2="-20"/>
        <line x1="30" y1="70" x2="30" y2="80"/>
        <line x1="-10" y1="30" x2="-20" y2="30"/>
        <line x1="70" y1="30" x2="80" y2="30"/>
        <line x1="-5" y1="-5" x2="-12" y2="-12"/>
        <line x1="65" y1="-5" x2="72" y2="-12"/>
        <line x1="-5" y1="65" x2="-12" y2="72"/>
        <line x1="65" y1="65" x2="72" y2="72"/>
      </g>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A 9x6 grid of squares representing household surfaces. Most are graphite (untouched), three are white (cleaned), and ONE is red with sparkle rays — the centerpiece of Mrs Hinch's method: a single truly clean square is enough to transform. 320px mixed-case title sits at the bottom. The single red is the sparkle.
